name: lamp-os-root
description: Root package for Lamp OS project

scripts.lamp:build: cd software/lamp-os && LAMP_FIRMWARE_CHANNEL=dev pio run -e upesy_wroom_${VARIANT:-standard}
scripts.ui:build: cd software/lamp-ui && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.lamp:buildfs: npm run ui:build && cd software/lamp-os && LAMP_FIRMWARE_CHANNEL=dev pio run -e upesy_wroom_${VARIANT:-standard} -t buildfs
scripts.lamp:flashfs: npm run ui:build && cd software/lamp-os && LAMP_FIRMWARE_CHANNEL=dev ${PORT:+env PLATFORMIO_UPLOAD_PORT=$PORT} pio run -e upesy_wroom_${VARIANT:-standard} -t uploadfs
scripts.//lamp:flash: DEV/BENCH TESTING ONLY: builds + flashes an unsigned dev image (LAMP_DEBUG on). To flash a lamp with signed release firmware, use lamp:flash:release.
scripts.lamp:flash: cd software/lamp-os && LAMP_FIRMWARE_CHANNEL=dev ${PORT:+env PLATFORMIO_UPLOAD_PORT=$PORT} pio run -e upesy_wroom_${VARIANT:-standard} -t upload
scripts.lamp:monitor: cd software/lamp-os && pio device monitor -e upesy_wroom_standard
scripts.wisp:build: cd software/wisp && LAMP_FIRMWARE_CHANNEL=dev pio run -e seeed_xiao_esp32_c6
scripts.//wisp:flash: DEV/BENCH TESTING ONLY: builds + flashes an unsigned dev image. To flash a wisp with signed release firmware, use wisp:flash:release.
scripts.wisp:flash: cd software/wisp && LAMP_FIRMWARE_CHANNEL=dev pio run -e seeed_xiao_esp32_c6 -t upload
scripts.wisp:monitor: cd software/wisp && pio device monitor -e seeed_xiao_esp32_c6
scripts.bridge:setup: cd tools/fake-lamp-bridge && { python3 -m venv .venv || python -m venv .venv; } && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.bridge: cd tools/fake-lamp-bridge && { [ -x .venv/bin/python ] || npm run bridge:setup; } && .venv/bin/python bridge.py
scripts.app:install: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && DEV=$(./scripts/android-id.sh) && flutter build apk --debug && adb -s $DEV install -r build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-debug.apk && adb -s $DEV shell monkey -p ca.lamplit.lamp_app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 > /dev/null
scripts.app:launch: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && DEV=$(./scripts/android-id.sh) && adb -s $DEV shell monkey -p ca.lamplit.lamp_app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 > /dev/null
scripts.app:codegen: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.app:watch: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && dart run build_runner watch --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.app:clean: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && flutter clean && flutter pub get && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
